overview: A minimal two-tier architecture: a Go backend REST API handling authentication and per-user task/category CRUD, and a React SPA frontend that communicates with the API over HTTPS using JWT bearer tokens. Data is scoped to the authenticated user on every request.
requirements: Users can sign up and log in with email and password; sessions use JWT bearer tokens.
Each user sees only their own tasks and categories (strict per-user data isolation).
Users can create tasks with a required title and optional due date.
Users can mark tasks complete or incomplete.
Users can create, list, and delete their own categories and assign tasks to them.
Users can edit and delete tasks they created.
Passwords are stored hashed (bcrypt), never in plain text.
Every deployable component exposes a /health endpoint returning 200.
Frontend redirects to login on 401 responses from the API.
The API enforces authorization on all task/category endpoints and returns 401/403/404 appropriately.

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: /
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /auth/signup:
    post:
      summary: Create a new user account
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '409':
          description: User exists
  /auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Log in
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '401':
          description: Invalid credentials
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List categories for current user
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'}
    post:
      summary: Create category
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name: {type: string}
              required: [name]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'}
  /categories/{id}:
    delete:
      summary: Delete category
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List tasks for current user
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: categoryId
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
    post:
      summary: Create task
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'}
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
  /tasks/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Update task
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete task
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
  /tasks/{id}/complete:
    post:
      summary: Toggle task completion
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
        - in: query
          name: completed
          schema: {type: boolean}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
  schemas:
    AuthRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        email: {type: string}
        password: {type: string}
      required: [email, password]
    AuthResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        token: {type: string}
        userId: {type: string}
    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string}
        name: {type: string}
    TaskInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        title: {type: string}
        dueDate: {type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true}
        categoryId: {type: string, nullable: true}
        completed: {type: boolean}
      required: [title]
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string}
        title: {type: string}
        dueDate: {type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true}
        categoryId: {type: string, nullable: true}
        completed: {type: boolean}
        createdAt: {type: string, format: date-time}
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a Go backend using net/http on port 9090. Provide endpoints for signup/login (issue a simple JWT signed with an env var secret JWT_SECRET, default 'devsecret'), CRUD for tasks and categories, and a /health endpoint returning 200 OK JSON {"status":"ok"}.

Storage: in-memory maps protected by a sync.RWMutex. Structures: User{ID,Email,PasswordHash}, Category{ID,UserID,Name}, Task{ID,UserID,Title,DueDate*time.Time,CategoryID string,Completed bool,CreatedAt}. Use bcrypt for password hashing and github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5 for tokens (24h expiry, subject=userId).

Auth middleware reads Authorization: Bearer <token>, validates JWT, injects userId into request context. All /tasks and /categories routes require auth and scope data by userId — users must never see other users' data. Return 401 on missing/invalid token, 403 if accessing a resource not owned by the caller, 404 if not found.

Endpoints:
- POST /auth/signup {email,password} -> 201 {token,userId}, 409 if email exists.
- POST /auth/login -> 200 {token,userId}, 401 on bad creds.
- GET/POST /categories; DELETE /categories/{id} (also nulls categoryId on that user's tasks).
- GET /tasks?categoryId=... ; POST /tasks {title,dueDate?,categoryId?} -> validate title non-empty.
- PUT /tasks/{id} updates fields; DELETE /tasks/{id}; POST /tasks/{id}/complete?completed=true|false toggles completion.

Enable permissive CORS (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *, allow Authorization header, handle OPTIONS preflight). Use UUIDs (github.com/google/uuid) for IDs. Log requests to stdout. Dockerfile: multi-stage build from golang:1.22-alpine to distroless/static, EXPOSE 9090, CMD the binary.

components.name: todo-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a React + TypeScript single-page app built with Vite. Serve via nginx on port 8080. Include a /health endpoint (static 200 JSON served by nginx location block).

Pages/flows:
- Login & Signup forms (email, password). Store JWT in localStorage.
- Main dashboard (requires auth): sidebar listing user's categories with add/delete; main panel shows tasks with filter by category, 'All', and 'Today'.
- Task row: checkbox to toggle complete, title, due date, edit & delete buttons. Add-task form with title input, optional date picker, category select.
- Edit task in a modal/inline form.
- Logout button clears token.

API base URL from env VITE_API_URL injected at build/runtime (use an env.js template substituted by nginx entrypoint script). All authenticated requests send Authorization: Bearer <token>; on 401 redirect to login. Use fetch and React Query or simple useEffect hooks. Use a clean minimal UI (e.g., Tailwind or basic CSS).

Dockerfile: build stage node:20-alpine running 'npm ci && npm run build'; runtime stage nginx:alpine copying dist to /usr/share/nginx/html, custom nginx.conf listening on 8080 with SPA fallback to index.html and /health returning 200.
